description_long: This is the head of an elderly man with a medium to dark complexion, featuring a full, dark beard and mustache. He is wearing a dark, close-fitting cap that covers the top and sides of his head, leaving his ears exposed. His ears are slightly prominent, and his facial expression appears neutral or slightly stern. The skin on his face shows some signs of aging, such as wrinkles and sagging, particularly around the eyes and cheeks. The beard is well-groomed and dense, contrasting with the smoothness of the cap. No visible accessories such as glasses or jewelry are present.
description: Head of an elderly man with a dark beard, wearing a dark cap and showing visible facial wrinkles.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the man's full face, beard, and both ears with the cap clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left profile view highlighting the ear, side of the cap, and the beard's contour along the jawline.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cap and the tops of both ears, with minimal facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right profile view showing the right ear, side of the cap, and the beard's outline along the jaw.
attribute_clothing_style: Dark, close-fitting cap with no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Head only, upright and facing forward.
attribute_hairstyle: Hair not visible under cap; full, dark beard and mustache.
attribute_facial_features: Full dark beard, mustache, visible wrinkles, prominent ears, no glasses.
